facebook.caption:
2,792 reviews. 4.4 stars. And most tourists still walk past Seashells Phu Quoc Hotel & Spa.

Free breakfast included. Private beach access. A full spa on site. Stylish rooms that don't feel like every other resort on the island.

This is the one locals recommend when family visits. Not the billboard hotel. This one.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
